svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="评审与修复角色分离" id="noreviewroles"> <mxGraphModel dx="-530" dy="-103" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1040" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="读写分离:评审的嘴和修复的手,是两个独立角色" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="520" x="260" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="改动落地
按模块分 6-8 桶
每桶 30-50 文件" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="170" x="60" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rev1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="评审 Agent A
只读 · worktree 隔离" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="320" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rev2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="评审 Agent B
只读 · worktree 隔离" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="320" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rev3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="评审 Agent C
只读 · worktree 隔离" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="320" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="revnote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="并行扇出 · 不改一个字
只输出「问题 / 严重度 / 建议」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="210" x="305" y="312" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fix1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0f766e;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="修复 Agent
流式 · 结果回来即派" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="620" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fix2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0f766e;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="修复 Agent
流式 · 结果回来即派" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="620" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="boundary" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="修复边界
① blocker 且方案明确 → 直接改
② major 或多方案 → 给候选,人来定
③ 业务语义/状态机/金额 → 禁碰,人工介入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="380" x="570" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gate" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="收敛计数器
严重连续 2 轮 + 一般连续 3 轮" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="860" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="diff" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="rev1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="diff" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="rev2" /> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="diff" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="rev3" /> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="rev1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;dashed=0;" target="fix1" /> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="rev3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;dashed=0;" target="fix2" /> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="fix2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="gate" /> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="fix1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="boundary" /> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
